message.content:
Explore the Next.js portal project at C:\Users\dazzl\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\portal. I need to understand:

1. The overall file structure (especially app/(dashboard)/ and components/)
2. Read these files completely:
   - app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx
   - components/Sidebar.tsx
   - lib/db.ts
   - lib/auth.ts
   - types/next-auth.d.ts
3. Read any existing page in app/(dashboard)/musteriler/ if it exists
4. Read any existing page like app/(dashboard)/laboratuvar/hizmet-listesi/ or app/(dashboard)/ugd/urun-listesi/ to understand the pattern used for list pages
5. Check app/styles/ directory for any shared CSS

Return the full content of all files found so I can understand the patterns used.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile a comprehensive summary: ## Next.js Portal Project - Complete Architecture & Patterns Analysis I've thoroughly explored the portal project and read all requested files. Here's a comprehensive breakdown: --- ### 1. **Overall File Structure** ``` /app/ ├── (dashboard)/ │ ├── layout.tsx [main dashboard layout with auth & permissions] │ ├── page.tsx [dashboard home] │ ├── plan/page.tsx [geliştirme planı] │ ├── admin/ │ │ ├── yetki-listesi/ [permissions management] │ │ └── muhasebe/ [accounting] │ ├── musteriler/ [customers module] │ │ ├── musteri-listesi/page.tsx [customer list] │ │ ├── musteri-listesi/MusteriTable.tsx [customer table component] │ │ ├── teklif-listesi/page.tsx │ │ ├── proforma-listesi/page.tsx │ │ └── fatura-takip/page.tsx │ ├── laboratuvar/ [laboratory module] │ │ ├── hizmet-listesi/page.tsx │ │ ├── hizmet-listesi/HizmetTable.tsx │ │ ├── hizmet-paketleri/ │ │ └── numune-takip/ │ ├── ugd/ [ÜGD (product compliance) module] │ │ ├── urun-listesi/page.tsx │ │ ├── urun-listesi/UrunTable.tsx │ │ ├── urun-listesi/yeni/page.tsx │ │ ├── cosing/ │ │ ├── firma-listesi/ │ │ ├── yonetmelik/ │ │ └── formul-kontrol/ ├── api/ [backend routes] ├── login/ ├── layout.tsx ├── styles/ │ └── table.module.css └── types/next-auth.d.ts /components/ ├── Sidebar.tsx [navigation sidebar with permission filtering] ├── Sidebar.module.css ├── Header.tsx ├── Header.module.css └── Providers.tsx /lib/ ├── db.ts [MSSQL connection pool] ├── auth.ts [NextAuth.js configuration] /types/ └── next-auth.d.ts [TypeScript type extensions] ``` --- ### 2. **Core Files - Full Content** #### **app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx** - **Purpose:** Dashboard wrapper layout with authentication & permission control - **Key Features:** - Checks session with `getServerSession(authOptions)` - Redirects unauthenticated users to `/login` - Loads user permissions from database via `PortalYetki` table (queries by `userId`) - Hardcoded admin IDs: `["1", "2"]` (Selin Eker, Oğuzhan Eker) - Passes `allowedKeys` (permission array) and `isAdmin` flag to Sidebar - Database error handling: empty `allowedKeys` = no menu restrictions - Renders: `` + `
` + `` #### **components/Sidebar.tsx** - **Purpose:** Navigation menu with permission-based visibility - **Key Features:** - Client component (`"use client"`) - Props: `allowedKeys: string[]`, `isAdmin: boolean` - **Permission Logic:** - If `allowedKeys` is empty → no restrictions (user hasn't been assigned permissions yet) - If `allowedKeys` has items → only visible items whose `menuKey` is in the set - Parent group visible if: parent menuKey is allowed OR at least 1 child menuKey is allowed - **Menu Structure:** ``` - Dashboard (always visible) - Geliştirme Planı (always visible) - ÜGD Detayları (if allowed) - Ürün Listesi - Cosing - Yönetmelik - Firma Listesi - Formül Kontrol (special, shown after ugd group) - Müşteriler (if allowed) - Müşteri Listesi - Teklif Listesi - Proforma Listesi - Fatura Takip - Laboratuvar (if allowed) - Numune Takip - Hizmet Listesi - Hizmet Paketleri - Admin Section (only if isAdmin = true) - Yetki Listesi - Muhasebe ``` - Uses `useState` for open/closed groups - Active state detection via `usePathname()` #### **lib/db.ts** - **Purpose:** MSSQL database connection pool - **Configuration:** - Connection params from `.env` variables: `DB_USER`, `DB_PASSWORD`, `DB_NAME`, `DB_SERVER` - Port: `1433` (MSSQL default) - Pool: max 10, min 0, 30s idle timeout - Options: `encrypt: true`, `trustServerCertificate: true` - Returns promise resolving to connection pool - Logs connection success/failure to console #### **lib/auth.ts** - **Purpose:** NextAuth.js configuration for Tesis Girişi (facility login) - **Key Features:** - **Provider:** CredentialsProvider (username + password) - **Column Detection:** Dynamically queries `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` to find: - Password column: tries `["Sifre", "Parola", "Password", "sifre", "password", "parola", "UserPassword", "UserParola"]` - Username column: tries `["KullaniciAdi", "Kadi", "UserName", "Username", "kullanici_adi", "Login", "kadi"]` - Email column: `["Email", "email", "EMail", "Eposta"]` - ID column: `["Id", "ID", "id", "KullaniciId"]` - Name column: `["AdSoyad", "FullName", "Name", "Adi"]` or combines FirstName + LastName - BirimID (department): `["BirimID", "BirimId", "birimid", "Birim"]` - **Login Logic:** - Queries `RootKullanici` table - Matches by username or email (if email column exists) - Plain-text password comparison - Returns user object with: `id`, `name`, `email`, `birimId` - **JWT Callbacks:** - Stores `birimId` and `userId` in token - Adds these to session object - **Session:** JWT strategy, 24-hour maxAge - **Env Var:** `NEXTAUTH_SECRET` for signing #### **types/next-auth.d.ts** - Extends NextAuth types with custom fields: - `User.birimId?: number` - `Session.user.birimId?: number` - `Session.user.userId?: string` - `JWT.birimId?: number` - `JWT.userId?: string` --- ### 3. **List Page Patterns** (Musteriler, Laboratuvar, ÜGD examples) #### **Pattern Structure: Page → Table Component** **Example 1: Müşteri Listesi** **Page: `musteriler/musteri-listesi/page.tsx`** ```typescript // Async server component // - Gets session (ensures auth) // - Renders styled page wrapper // - Imports table component // - Sets metadata

Müşteri Listesi

Aktif müşteri ve tedarikçi kayıtları.

``` **Table Component: `MusteriTable.tsx`** (Client component) - **State Management:** - `data: Musteri[]` - table rows - `page`, `limit`, `total`, `totalPages` - pagination - `search` - search term - `modalOpen`, `modalMode` - edit/add modal - `form` - form data - `editId` - which row being edited - `deleteTarget` - which row being deleted - **Interfaces:** ```typescript interface Musteri { ID: number; Ad: string; Adres: string | null; VergiDairesi: string | null; VergiNo: string | null; Telefon: string | null; Email: string | null; Web: string | null; Tur2: string | null; Yetkili: string | null; Kimin: string | null; } interface ApiResponse { data: Musteri[]; total: number; page: number; limit: number; totalPages: number; } ``` - **Key Functions:** - `fetchData(search, page, limit)` - GET `/api/musteriler?search=...&page=...&limit=...` - `handleSearch(val)` - debounced search (350ms) - `handleSave()` - POST (new) or PUT (edit) to `/api/musteriler[/:id]` - `handleDelete()` - DELETE `/api/musteriler/:id` - `openAdd()` / `openEdit(m)` - open modal - `pageNumbers()` - pagination logic - **UI Elements:** - **Toolbar:** Search box, record count, page size select (10/20/50), "Add New" button - **Table:** 8 columns (ID, Firma Adı, Tür, Adres, V.D./V.N., Yetkili, İletişim, Actions) - **Loading:** Skeleton rows - **Empty:** "Kayıt bulunamadı" - **Pagination:** Smart pagination (shows: 1 ... 2-4 ... last) - **Modal (Add/Edit):** - Form grid: 2 columns with `colSpan2` for wider fields - Fields: Ad*, Tür, Yetkili, Adres, VergiDairesi, VergiNo, Telefon, Email, Web - Validation: "Firma adı zorunludur" - Buttons: İptal, KAYDET - **Delete Modal:** Confirmation popup - **Row Actions:** Edit (pencil icon), Delete (trash icon) --- **Example 2: Laboratuvar → Hizmet Listesi** **Page: `laboratuvar/hizmet-listesi/page.tsx`** ```typescript // Similar pattern: async page, session check, metadata, styled header

Hizmet Listesi

Laboratuvar analiz hizmetleri — akreditasyonlu testler yıldız (*) ile işaretlidir.

``` **Table Component: `HizmetTable.tsx`** (Client component) - **Interfaces:** ```typescript interface Hizmet { ID: number; Kod: string; Ad: string; AdEn: string; Method: string; MethodEn: string; Matriks: string; Akreditasyon: string; Sure: number | null; NumGereklilik: string; NumDipnot: string; NumDipnotEn: string; Fiyat: number | null; ParaBirimi: string; Durumu: string; } ``` - **Unique Features:** - **Accreditation Star:** First column shows "*" if `Akreditasyon === "Var"` - **Two Modal Types:** 1. **Detail Modal:** Read-only view with sections for TR + EN fields 2. **Edit Modal:** Form with Turkish/English split (Ad/AdEn, Method/MethodEn, etc.) - **Detail Section Helper:** Displays label-value pairs (2-column grid) - **Form Grid:** Uses `formGrid` and `formGrid3` for responsive layouts - **Durum (Status):** Only shown in edit modal if NOT new record - **API:** GET `/api/hizmetler`, POST/PUT `/api/hizmetler[/:id]` - **Page Size:** 10, 20, 50, 100 options --- **Example 3: ÜGD → Ürün Listesi** **Page: `ugd/urun-listesi/page.tsx`** **Table Component: `UrunTable.tsx`** (Client component) - **Interfaces:** ```typescript interface Urun { ID: number; Tarih: string; RaporNo: string; Versiyon: string; Firma: string; FirmaID: number; Barkod: string; Urun: string; Miktar: string; Tip1: string; Tip2: number; UrunTipiFull: string; ADegeri: string; DurumLabel: string; } ``` - **Unique Features:** - **Lookups:** Fetches dropdown data via `/api/urunler/lookup` (firmalar, tipler) - **Navigation Pattern:** Uses `router.push("/ugd/urun-listesi/yeni")` for "Add New" - Separate `/yeni` page for creation (not inline modal) - **Durum Badge:** Color-coded status (green for "Tamamlandı", orange for others) - **Complex Form Fields:** Date, selects with lookup data - **Modal Max Width:** 800px - **Page Size Default:** 10 (not 20) --- ### 4. **Shared Styles** (app/styles/table.module.css) Comprehensive CSS module with these class groups: | Group | Classes | Purpose | |-------|---------|---------| | **Page Layout** | `.page`, `.pageHeader`, `.pageTitle`, `.pageSubtitle` | Page structure & typography | | **Toolbar** | `.toolbar`, `.toolbarLeft/Right`, `.searchBox`, `.searchInput`, `.searchClear`, `.addBtn`, `.pageSizeSelect`, `.totalCount` | Header controls | | **Table** | `.tableCard`, `.tableWrapper`, `.table`, `.table thead`, `.table tbody`, `.table tbody tr` | Table structure | | **Table Cells** | `.tdNum`, `.tdName`, `.tdAdres`, `.tdMono`, `.tdSecondary`, `.contactCell`, `.contactItem` | Cell styling | | **Loading** | `.skeleton` (shimmer animation) | Placeholder while loading | | **Empty State** | `.empty` | "No results" message | | **Pagination** | `.pagination`, `.pageBtn`, `.pageBtnActive`, `.pageDots`, `.pageInfo` | Pagination controls | | **Modal** | `.modalOverlay`, `.modal`, `.modalSm`, `.modalHeader`, `.modalClose`, `.modalBody`, `.modalFooter` | Modal dialogs | | **Forms** | `.formGrid`, `.formGrid3`, `.formGroup`, `.formError`, `.required`, `input/select/textarea` (focused states) | Form elements | | **Buttons** | `.cancelBtn`, `.saveBtn`, `.deleteBtnPrimary`, `.editBtn`, `.deleteBtn` | Button styles | | **Badges** | `.badge`, `.badgeGreen`, `.badgeGray` | Status indicators | | **Loading Spinner** | `.loader` (spin animation) | Save button loader | **Color Variables Used:** `--color-accent`, `--color-danger`, `--color-surface`, `--color-border`, `--color-text-primary/secondary/tertiary`, etc. --- ### 5. **Key Patterns & Conventions** 1. **Page Structure:** - Async server component (checks auth) - Sets metadata - Imports CSS module: `styles from '@/app/styles/table.module.css'` - Returns styled header + table component 2. **Table Component Pattern:** - Client component (`"use client"`) - Fetches data on mount + dependency changes - Debounced search (350-400ms) - Modal for add/edit, separate confirm modal for delete - Smart pagination - Skeleton loading states 3. **API Conventions:** - GET `/api/{resource}?search=...&page=...&limit=...` → `{ data, total, page, limit, totalPages }` - POST `/api/{resource}` → create - PUT `/api/{resource}/:id` → update - DELETE `/api/{resource}/:id` → delete - Optional `/api/{resource}/lookup` for dropdown data 4. **Permission System:** - Stored in `PortalYetki` table: `(KullaniciID, MenuKey)` - Empty permissions = no restrictions - Parent visibility depends on parent key OR any child key 5. **Authentication:** - NextAuth.js with Credentials provider - Plain-text password (not hashed!) - Dynamic column name detection - Session contains: `userId` (DB ID), `birimId` (department) --- ### 6. **File Paths for Reference** | File | Absolute Path | |------|--------------| | Dashboard Layout | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx` | | Sidebar Component | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/components/Sidebar.tsx` | | DB Module | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/lib/db.ts` | | Auth Config | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/lib/auth.ts` | | Type Extensions | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/types/next-auth.d.ts` | | Müşteri Listesi Page | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/app/(dashboard)/musteriler/musteri-listesi/page.tsx` | | Müşteri Table | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/app/(dashboard)/musteriler/musteri-listesi/MusteriTable.tsx` | | Hizmet Listesi Page | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/app/(dashboard)/laboratuvar/hizmet-listesi/page.tsx` | | Hizmet Table | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/app/(dashboard)/laboratuvar/hizmet-listesi/HizmetTable.tsx` | | Ürün Listesi Page | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/app/(dashboard)/ugd/urun-listesi/page.tsx` | | Ürün Table | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/app/(dashboard)/ugd/urun-listesi/UrunTable.tsx` | | Shared Table Styles | `/c/Users/dazzl/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/portal/app/styles/table.module.css` | --- This comprehensive guide shows the full architecture and established patterns for creating new list pages in this portal. Each section follows the same structure: server page + client table component + shared styling module.
